Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified, UNSPECIFIED, UNSPECIFIED; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:emailAddress, EMAIL, EMAIL; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:encrypted, ENCRYPTED, ENCRYPTED; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:transient, TRANSIENT, TRANSIENT; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:persistent, PERSISTENT, PERSISTENT; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:entity, ENTITY, ENTITY; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:kerberos, KERBEROS, KERBEROS; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:WindowsDomainQualifiedName, WIN_DOMAIN_QUALIFIED, WIN_DOMAIN_QUALIFIED; urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:X509SubjectName, X509_SUBJECT, X509_SUBJECT
